description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling L-shaped footprint and a combination of hip and gable rooflines. The exterior features a mix of light-colored walls, dark roofing, and multiple window groupings, giving it a modern yet classic suburban appearance. A prominent driveway leads to a three-car garage, while the rear of the property includes a large patio area and an in-ground swimming pool with steps. The landscaping is minimal, with a small tree and some flower beds visible near the entrance and along the perimeter. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and grouped patterns, and a covered porch is present at the front entrance. The overall design suggests a comfortable, upscale suburban home with ample outdoor living space.
description: A spacious, single-story bungalow with a mix of hip and gable roofs, a three-car garage, a large patio, and a swimming pool. The exterior is light-colored with dark roofing and features a covered front porch and grouped windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and three-car garage.
description_view_1: Top-down rear view highlighting the patio, swimming pool, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool area, patio, and back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the garage doors, driveway extension, and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and front-facing windows
